sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103305" key="te/tlaqi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τέτλᾰθι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετλαίην</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετλάμεν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετλάμεναι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετληώς</orth>, <sense id="n103305.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Τλάω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
